system.flavor: A blur of cape, a flash of color, the gleaming of blades.
system.effect:
Effect [X]: Dash X+2. You must dash in a straight line as far as possible. You gain phasing for this dash. The first foe you pass though takes 2 damage. The second takes 1d3+1. The third or more take 2d3+2.
Finishing Blow haste if you passed through a bloodied foe. Also gain evasion if you passed through a foe in crisis.
